name: adv-rerun-stability
notes: Two executions of a deterministically failing test at an identical tree_digest MUST yield identical evidence. Because run_id is the content address of the whole record excluding only the recording group (timestamps), and evidence_digest is part of that record, two reruns at the same tree produce the SAME run_id -- a superset proof of evidence_digest stability. If durations or wall-clock leaked into the digest, the run_ids would diverge. The comparison is additionally byte-deterministic.
